title: Verilator bug in signdness of {single}
body:
--- Author Name: **Clifford Wolf** (@cliffordwolf) Original Redmine Issue: 759 from https://www.veripool.org Original Date: 2014-05-03 Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder) --- Verilator a985a1f returns 11001 instead of 01001, i.e. verilator performs sign extension even though the result of { .. } is unsigned. ```module issue_038(y); output [4:0] y; assign y = { -4'sd7 }; endmodule ``` Self-contained test case:
http://svn.clifford.at/handicraft/2014/verilatortest/test010.v
http://svn.clifford.at/handicraft/2014/verilatortest/test010.cc
http://svn.clifford.at/handicraft/2014/verilatortest/test010.sh
